formulas.name: 1. Definition of Democracy
formulas.formula: Democracy = A system of government where power is vested in the people

formulas.name: 2. Characteristics of Democratic System
formulas.formula: Free and Fair Elections + Political Parties + Independent Judiciary + Free Press
formulas.notes: Essential features of a democratic system

formulas.name: 3. Congress System Challenges
formulas.notes: Factors that challenged the Congress system

formulas.name: 4. Nehru's Vision of India
formulas.notes: Key elements of Jawaharlal Nehru's vision for India

formulas.name: 5. Indira Gandhi's Domestic Policies
formulas.formula: Garibi Hatao + Bank Nationalisation + Land Reform
formulas.notes: Major domestic policies implemented by Indira Gandhi

formulas.name: 6. Congress Party's Decline
formulas.formula: Decline = Internal Conflicts + External Pressures + Loss of Legitimacy
formulas.notes: Factors that contributed to the decline of the Congress party

formulas.name: 7. Rise of Regional Parties
formulas.formula: Rise = Increased Regional Awareness + Desire for Autonomy
formulas.notes: Factors that led to the rise of regional parties in India

formulas.name: 9. Challenges to Indian Democracy
formulas.notes: Major challenges faced by Indian democracy

formulas.name: 10. Importance of Democratic Institutions
formulas.formula: Stable Democracy = Strong Institutions + Active Citizenship
formulas.notes: Key factors that contribute to a stable democratic system
